messages.content: You are a helpful customer support assistant.
I ordered a laptop 5 days ago but haven't received any shipping confirmation. Can you check on my order?

I'd be happy to help you check on your order! To look up your order status, I'll need your order number — it should be in your confirmation email, starting with #ORD-. Could you share that with me? In the meantime, please know that orders typically ship within 2-3 business days, and shipping confirmation emails can sometimes be delayed or land in spam folders. Let me get this sorted for you.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
Your app keeps crashing when I try to upload photos. I'm on iPhone 15 with the latest iOS.

I'm sorry about the crashes — that's frustrating. Let's try a few things to fix this:

1. Force-close the app (swipe up from the bottom, then swipe the app away) and reopen it
2. Check if there's an app update available in the App Store
3. Go to Settings > General > iPhone Storage and make sure you have at least 1GB free
4. Try restarting your iPhone

If the crashes continue after these steps, could you let me know the app version number (found in Settings within the app)? I'll escalate this to our engineering team with those details.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
I want a refund. The product quality is terrible and nothing like what was advertised.

I completely understand your frustration, and I'm sorry the product didn't meet your expectations. You're absolutely entitled to a refund under our 30-day satisfaction guarantee.

Here's what I can do for you right now:
- Process a full refund to your original payment method (takes 5-7 business days to appear)
- Or offer a replacement if you'd prefer to try a different item

For the refund, I just need your order number. You don't need to return the item if it's under $50. If you'd like to share what specifically was different from the listing, I'll also pass that feedback to our product team so we can improve.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
How do I cancel my subscription? I can't find the option anywhere.

I can help you cancel your subscription. Here's how to do it:

1. Log in to your account at our website
2. Click your profile icon (top right corner)
3. Go to 'Subscription & Billing'
4. Click 'Manage Subscription'
5. Select 'Cancel Subscription'

Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. If you'd like, I can also cancel it for you directly right now — just confirm your account email.

Also, if cost is a concern, we do have a discounted annual plan or a pause option for up to 3 months. No pressure at all — just wanted to make sure you know about those options.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
I was charged twice for the same order! This is unacceptable.

I sincerely apologize for the double charge — that should never happen, and I understand how concerning it is to see an unexpected charge.

Let me look into this immediately. Can you provide:
- Your order number
- The last 4 digits of the card that was charged

In most cases, one of the charges is a temporary authorization hold that drops off within 3-5 business days. But if it's a genuine double charge, I'll process an immediate refund for the duplicate amount and send you a confirmation email.

Either way, I'll make sure this gets resolved today.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
Do you ship internationally? I'm in Germany.

Yes, we do ship to Germany! Here are the details:

- Standard International Shipping: 10-15 business days, €8.99
- Express International Shipping: 3-5 business days, €24.99
- Free shipping on orders over €75

A few things to keep in mind: customs duties and import taxes may apply depending on the order value, and those are the buyer's responsibility. Orders over €150 will almost certainly incur customs fees.

All prices on our site will be shown in EUR once we detect your location. Is there anything specific you're looking to order? I can confirm availability for German delivery.
